title: Crosshair - Hollow
description: New crosshairs for a better aiming experience.
body:
## Crosshair Pack
— Crosshair Pack – If you're tired of the classic Minecraft crosshair, this pack is a nice change. It replaces the default crosshair with clean custom designs that fit well with different styles and resource packs. It’s simple, but it makes aiming feel a lot better in-game.
